title: AAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Scientific Helper Posts
description: The Assam Agriculture University (AAU) has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of Scientific Helper Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can use this opportunity and apply for the AAU Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is a li...
